name: visual-context-router
description: Token-aware visual context routing for Codex and AI agents.

interface.shortDescription: Compress screenshots into structured visual state.
interface.longDescription: Visual Context Router helps Codex and other AI agents reduce visual token usage by combining screenshot diffing, UI element extraction, region-of-interest crops, and compact wireframe prompts.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Visual Context Router to inspect screenshots with low token overhead.
